page_content: TDPS479 Production Practicum (1-3 Credits) A graded course in a speciﬁed practical aspect of mounting a theatre or dance production. It is a hands-on, purely laboratory experience. Prerequisite: TDPS201. Repeatable to: 10 credits if content differs. Credit Only Granted for: TDPS479 or THET479. Formerly: THET479.
